name: Synup Office Hour #3:26 de marzo de 2024
episode_summary: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__The Synup Office Hour #3 discussed effective strategies for optimizing local search presence, covering topics like review recency, Google algorithm updates, and leveraging videos and FAQs on Google Business profiles.
episode_summary_rich_text:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__
  • Importance of review recency for local search ranking.
  • Strategies for soliciting and managing customer reviews effectively.
  • Updates on recent Google algorithm changes, including spam guidelines.
  • Tips for leveraging videos and FAQ sections on Google Business profiles.
  • Suggestions for keyword optimization to enhance visibility and engagement.
    ‍

Additionally, attendees can download the event deck and event notes for further reference. ·

- Get the event deck here
- Get the event notes here
